response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team instrumentation frameworks — key requirements for this Principal IC role.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering with diverse languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Python-like usage)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to ship complex systems under ambiguity (e.g., global mail platform, real-time telemetry)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or owning experimentation/feature-flagging platforms at scale
Limited visibility into metrics, statistical analysis, or bias/risk controls in experimentation
Role history shows individual contributor strength but minimal evidence of cross-team technical leadership or stakeholder alignment
